docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $425.92 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SVCS OF S. CA INC AS TO DEFENDANT BARROGA LEONORA E BARROGA ROBERT E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARROGA LEONORA E
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARROGA ROBERT E
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO LEONORA BARROGA, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE IN COUNTY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SVCS OF S. CA INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARROGA LEONORA E BARROGA ROBERT E $425.92 PRINCIPAL, $91.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $516.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
